case_title: EDDIE YOUNG et al VS. GLEN VARDA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-01-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-01-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HUARD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,907.85 FILED BY YOUNG, EDDIE HUANG, ALLEN AS TO DEFENDANT VARDA, GLEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID HUARD FILED BY YOUNG, EDDIE VARDA, GLEN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2009 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNG, EDDIE HUANG, ALLEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VARDA, GLEN PLAINTIFF FAILED TO CARRY THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF REPEATEDLY CHANGED HIS STORY AND FAILED TO RECALL CURCIAL FACTS TO PROVE ELEMENTS OF CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
